string.text: Spike: dorn_bleed.ppe when bleed tier worsens. Sustained: dorn_bleeding.ppe while tier 1 or higher. Intensity follows a smoothed bleed value (0-1). Stock hit blood splashes are unchanged.
User scale for the wound spike postprocess (0-1). Multiplied by smoothed bleed intensity.
User scale for the sustained bleed overlay (0-1). Multiplied by smoothed bleed intensity.
Play sound on bleed tier increase
Play dorn_bleed\bleed.ogg when bleed tier goes up.
Press a key to preview each effect once after editing in the Postprocess Editor. Works even when you are not bleeding.
One-shot wound spike вЂ” same as when bleed tier increases.
One-shot preview of the sustained bleed overlay timeline.
Hold to raise actor bleeding by about one HUD tier per second (0.5 per sec).
Print bleed fix state to the on-screen debug log.
